        +String roomName
        +ChatBackground background
        +void setBackground(ChatBackground background)

        +void removeSprache(Sprache sprache)
        +List<String> getSupportedLanguages()
    }

    System "1" -- "*" Sprache : supports

diagrams.content:
%%{ init : { "theme" : "default" } }%%
C4Context
    title Meta AI Chat System Context

    Person(customer, "Customer", "A user interacting with the AI assistant.")
    Person(admin, "Admin", "An administrator managing the AI assistant.")

    System(metaAIChat, "Meta AI Chat", "A system providing AI assistant integration.")

    System_Ext(thirdPartyAPI, "Third Party API", "External APIs for additional functionalities.")

    Rel(customer, metaAIChat, "Uses")
    Rel(admin, metaAIChat, "Manages")
    Rel(metaAIChat, thirdPartyAPI, "Integrates with")

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[User Request]
    B --> C{Identify User Intent}
    C -->|Information| D[Provide Information]
    C -->|Assistance| E[Offer Assistance]
    C -->|Feedback| F[Request Feedback]
    D --> G[End Interaction]
    E --> G
    F --> G
    G --> H[Log Interaction]
    H --> I[Analyze Data]
    I --> J{Improve AI Model}
    J -->|Yes| K[Update Model]
    J -->|No| L[Maintain Current Model]
    K --> M[Deploy Updated Model]
    L --> M
    M --> N[End]

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant MetaAI as Meta AI Assistant
    participant System as Integration System

    User->>MetaAI: Request assistance
    MetaAI->>System: Send user query
    System-->>MetaAI: Processed response
    MetaAI-->>User: Provide response
    User->>MetaAI: Follow-up question
    MetaAI->>System: Send follow-up query
    System-->>MetaAI: Processed follow-up response
    MetaAI-->>User: Provide follow-up response

diagrams.content:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Active : Start Abwesenheitsnachricht
    Active --> Sending : Nachricht wird gesendet
    Sending --> Sent : Nachricht gesendet
    Sent --> Idle : Zurück zu Idle
    Active --> Cancelled : Abbrechen
    Cancelled --> Idle : Zurück zu Idle

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Abwesenheitsnachricht erforderlich?}
    B -- Ja --> C[Automatische Abwesenheitsnachricht generieren]
    B -- Nein --> D[Keine Aktion erforderlich]
    C --> E[Nachricht an Absender senden]
    E --> F[Abwesenheitsnachricht aktivieren]
    F --> G[Ende]
    D --> G

    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Email as E-Mail-Server

    User->>System: Abwesenheitsnachricht aktivieren
    System->>User: Bestätigung der Aktivierung
    User->>System: Abwesenheitsnachricht konfigurieren
    System->>User: Konfiguration bestätigen
    User->>Email: E-Mail senden
    Email->>System: E-Mail empfangen

    Email->>User: Abwesenheitsnachricht an Absender
